flashcards.back: Multiply by a conversion factor written as a fraction where units cancel. 5 km × (1000 m/1 km) = 5000 m.
Because 1000 m = 1 km, so 1000 m / 1 km = 1. Multiplying by 1 doesn't change the value.

flashcards.front: How do you convert km/h to m/s?
flashcards.back: Two conversions: (km → m) and (h → s). 90 km/h × (1000 m/km) × (1 h/3600 s) = 25 m/s.
